runner_bean.scenario_replay_caveat: The canonical 183-sample metadata retains FrijCol_11 and excludes FrijCol_10. Several released Dsuite scenario maps instead substitute FrijCol_10 while retaining an n=19 label. This manifest follows the canonical included set and is not claimed as a verbatim Table S4 replay.
